The '''''Raven's Claw''''' was a fast [[Courier/Legends|light courier]] that replaced [[Kyle Katarn]]'s old ship, the ''[[Moldy Crow/Legends|Moldy Crow]]''.

==History==
[[File:RavensClawJediPraxeum-JediOutcast.jpg|thumb|left|180px|''Raven's Claw'' lands at the [[Jedi Praxeum]] on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]].]]
After the ''Moldy Crow'' crashed on [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]] during the battle against [[Jerec (Inquisitor)|Jerec]], [[Jan Ors]] and Kyle Katarn continued their career as [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] and fought their battles against the [[Imperial Remnant]] flying this ship. Jan Ors was apparently the pilot, who was said to be a better pilot than her companion. It was Jan's job, when she was not following mission objectives with Katarn, to ensure that he could be pulled out as quickly as possible should the operation turn desperate. This tactic almost cost Jan Ors her life, when [[Desann]] and [[Tavion Axmis]] found and abducted her, compelling Katarn to take up his abandoned Force powers and return to the [[Valley of the Jedi]] on Ruusan.

After Katarn started his search for Desann, Master [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Skywalker]] promised him to take care of the ''Raven's Claw'' during his search. After Desann's death on [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], Katarn and Jan Ors continued to fly this ship.

During the time of the [[Disciples of Ragnos]], [[Jaden Korr]] was the co-pilot of the ''Raven's Claw'' with Katarn. Together, they flew to [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]], [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] (twice), [[Nar Kreeta]], [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]], [[Byss/Legends|Byss]] and [[Taspir III]].

==Behind the scenes==
Two different models were made for the ''Jedi Knight'' series: one with high polygon number for cinematics and one with fewer polygons for in-game use. As such, in cut-scenes it seems to need a level 2 or 3 force jump to get on top of it, whereas in game where ever it appears, Jaden can jump on top of it with a level 1 force jump and is just as tall, if not taller that the height of the cockpit. Furthermore, during cutscenes in ''Jedi Outcast'' the cockpit is portrayed as having room for two to sit side-by-side.

Despite having no obvious external weapons, in one cutscene from ''Jedi Academy'' which precedes a [[Mission to Corellia (Disciples of Ragnos crisis)|mission to Corellia]], Kyle mentions fighting off armed pirate ships with the ''Raven's Claw'' while Jaden Korr handles the liberation of a high-speed tram from terrorists. Furthermore, in the same mission, the ''Raven's Claw'' can be seen gunning and destroying a cult ship after Jaden runs past a certain point.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight II: Jedi Outcast]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Galaxy of Heroes]]''
